title: Diamondback Energy, Inc. Schedules First Quarter 2023 Conference Call for May 2, 2023
text: MIDLAND, Texas, March 29, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Diamondback Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: FANG) (“Diamondback”), today announced that it plans to release first quarter 2023 financial results on May 1, 2023 after the market closes.

title: Diamondback (FANG) Joins UN Program to Lower Methane Intensity
text: Diamondback Energy (FANG) participates in the Oil and Gas Methane Partnership 2.0, which is the United Nations Environment Programme's flagship oil and gas reporting and mitigation program.
